description: Bare concatenated Exp4 prompts. Format: optional prime sentence, blank line, target sentence, blank line, role question, newline, answer prefix.

questions.core_doer: In the [target nominalized-verb] event, who was the doer?
questions.core_acted_on: In the [target nominalized-verb] event, who was the one acted on?
questions.jabberwocky_doer: In the event just described, who was the doer?
questions.jabberwocky_acted_on: In the event just described, who was the one acted on?

answer_prefixes.acted_on: Answer: The one acted on was the

filler_note: Fillers use no determiners and no PP prepositions. They are assigned the opposite tense from the target where possible, match the earlier 6/7-token filler length distribution, and serve as unrelated sentence baselines without introducing target preposition overlap.
